query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 9 
WHERE categoryId NOT IN (9, 11) 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%padaria%' OR name LIKE '%Padaria%'
    OR name LIKE '%panificadora%' OR name LIKE '%Panificadora%'
    OR name LIKE '%bakery%' OR name LIKE '%Bakery%'
    OR name LIKE '%boulangerie%' OR name LIKE '%Boulangerie%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 9 
WHERE categoryId NOT IN (9, 11) 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%padaria%' OR name LIKE '%Padaria%'
    OR name LIKE '%panificadora%' OR name LIKE '%Panificadora%'
    OR name LIKE '%bakery%' OR name LIKE '%Bakery%'
    OR name LIKE '%boulangerie%' OR name LIKE '%Boulangerie%');
